unit.note: F0 fresh full run of shared/tests/ (the suite consuming the changed shared/scripts modules): 1776 passed, 11 skipped, 18 deselected. The 7 failures (test_hooks.py TestCheckSecrets x5 + TestCheckFileSize x1, test_artifact_path_canon.py compliance-migrated x1) are the documented pre-existing baseline on origin/main — identical test IDs, none in this iterate's diff. 0 regressions. The other plugin test packages are no-op-affected (the changed modules are not imported by them).

integration.note: No CRUD/DB changes; small BUG iterate. integration-tests/ unaffected.

e2e.note: F0.5 surface=cli — pytest over shared/tests/{test_drift_triage_emit,test_f0_5_triage_emit,test_triage_storage,test_surface_verification}.py. Drives both bugs' producer -> triage.jsonl -> consumer round-trip plus the surface_verification main() resolve wiring end-to-end.

surface_verification.runner: uv run --extra dev pytest shared/tests/test_drift_triage_emit.py shared/tests/test_f0_5_triage_emit.py shared/tests/test_triage_storage.py shared/tests/test_surface_verification.py -p no:cacheprovider --color=no
surface_verification.note: Single shared/tests package — avoids the cross-tests-package collection collision; --color=no per ADR-048 so the N-passed parse is not eaten by ANSI escapes.

degraded: 7 pre-existing baseline test failures on origin/main (test_hooks.py TestCheckSecrets x5 + TestCheckFileSize x1, test_artifact_path_canon.py compliance-migrated x1) — same test IDs documented in the prior iterate's baseline note; NOT introduced by this iterate, 0 regressions.

check_drift.py (553 lines) and surface_verification.py (644 lines) exceed the 300-line file-size guideline; both were already over (464/542) before this iterate and check_file_size is WARN-only — splitting is a separate refactor, out of scope for a 2-bug fix (recorded in the iterate ADR).
